creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #11)
> I attached psm snippets from dmesg with the patch synaptics-identify-0x46.patch.
Could you place raw (not grepped) chunk of dmesg output starting from
> psm0: current command byte:0067
and finishing with
> psm0: syncmask:c0, syncbits:00
lines?
